positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic forest creature, perhaps a luminous stag or griffin silhouette, surrounded by swirling magical floral elements and ancient knotwork. The design should use a limited palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and luminous gold leaf accents, set against a creamy, parchment background. Emphasize high contrast and clean, bold lines, suitable for a centered apparel print. Graphic novel style, flat vector illustration, intricate linework, Art Nouveau influences, symmetrical composition, dotwork texture, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, amateur, watermark, text, signature, copyright, low detail, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, grain, messy, photo, realistic
